title: ジャパンCの後に・滾るこころ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to all her hard work leading up to this
point, Grass Wonder claims victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her sights are now set on the Arima Kinen where
a clash with Maruzensky awaits.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, El Condor Pasa leaves the venue in a
hurry, almost as if running away from Grass
Wonder.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Emotions whirl as the winds grow colder. Winter is
on the horizon, but Grass Wonder's classic year is
far from over yet...
